simple_types.name: Evalpred

documentation.description:
Where the node is stored : global stack, local stack or the heap.
globalF > localF > heapF in order of premanence.

simple_types.name: Nodetag
simple_types.code: type Nodetag is (Funct, Intt, Vart, Skelt);

documentation.description:
type of node.
   funcT : function.
   intT  : integer.
   varT  : variable.
   anonT : anonymous variable.
   skelT : a skeleton database term.

simple_types.name: Optype
simple_types.code: type Optype is (Fxo, Fyo, Xfo, Yfo, Xfxo, Xfyo, Yfxo, Nono);

documentation.description: Predicate type of atom : normal or evaluable predicate.

record_types.name: Answer_Record
Atom_Record
Binding_Type
Cls

fields.name: Nvars
fields.description: Number of local vars excluding anons.

fields.name: Dbase
fields.description: The database this clause belongs to.

fields.name: Previous
fields.description: Ptr to previous clause in program.

fields.name: Next
fields.description: Ptr to next clause for program.

record_types.name: Integer_Record
Node

fields.name: Brother
fields.description: next argument of parent functor, other purposes.

fields.name: Scope
fields.description: various kinds of scope on various stacks.

fields.name: Son
fields.description: pointer to the list of argumrnts

access_types.name: Atom_Info
access_types.code: type Atom_Info is access all Atom_Record;

documentation.description: Incomplete clause definition for use in atom.

subtypes.name: Evalarity
subtypes.code: subtype Evalarity is Integer range 0 .. Maxevalarity;

subtypes.name: Prec
subtypes.code: subtype Prec is Integer range 0 .. Maxprec;

generic_instantiations.name: Atom_Pkg
Clause_Garb
generic_instantiations.code:
package Clause_Garb is
  new Garbage_Collection (Cls, Clptr);

generic_instantiations.name: Func_Garb
generic_instantiations.code:
package Func_Garb is
  new Variant_Garbage_Collection (Nodetag, Funct, Node, Term);

generic_instantiations.name: Int_Garb
generic_instantiations.code:
package Int_Garb is
  new Variant_Garbage_Collection (Nodetag, Intt, Node, Term);

generic_instantiations.name: Skel_Garb
generic_instantiations.code:
package Skel_Garb is
  new Variant_Garbage_Collection (Nodetag, Skelt, Node, Term);

generic_instantiations.name: Var_Garb
generic_instantiations.code:
package Var_Garb is
  new Variant_Garbage_Collection (Nodetag, Vart, Node, Term);
